title: SpamCrackers — Email Abuse Intelligence Reference Model & Standard
description: A defensive, analytical reference for email abuse: the Email Abuse Intelligence Reference Model (six pillars, 163 classification-and-defence techniques with stable identifiers, a 24-axis / 128-class campaign taxonomy, a documented patterns library, and an evidence & confidence model) and the SpamCrackers Standard for email authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, MX). Deterministic, machine-readable, and gate-verified. Content licensed CC BY 4.0.
